bindings.title: Marijana Pavlinić / Digital Stamp Collection
bindings.excerpt: Paying homage to my grandpa's lifelong passion for philately, by recreating his stamps in a digital form, exploring the blend of art, history, and typography and bringing it online for a new audience to enjoy.
bindings.source_summary: Paying homage to my grandpa's lifelong passion for philately, by recreating his stamps in a digital form, exploring the blend of art, history, and typography and bringing it online for a new audience to enjoy.
